# Efeonce Think

> Public lead-magnet hub by Efeonce Group SpA. This site explains and renders tools for measuring brand visibility in answer engines and generative search surfaces.

## Canonical Site

- https://think.efeoncepro.com/

## Public Pages

- https://think.efeoncepro.com/brand-visibility
  - Brand Visibility Grader landing.
  - Explains how the private report evaluates presence, citability, exactness, operability, and brand preference.
  - The page embeds a governed Greenhouse Growth Forms renderer for requesting a private report.

## Private / Token-Gated Pages

- `/brand-visibility/r/{token}` renders a private report for a specific submitted lead.
- Token-gated report URLs are not intended for indexing or broad retrieval.

## Method

- Framework: Be Found, Be Readable, Be Correct, Be Actionable, Be Intrinsic.
- Analysis focus: answer engines, AI Overviews, ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, Gemini, and generative search surfaces.
- Owner: Efeonce Group SpA.
- Main organization site: https://efeoncepro.com/
